# Zero OS Kernel R&D Foundation

This folder defines the first kernel foundation track while Zero OS remains AI/runtime first.

## Scope
- boot and trust chain
- memory manager model
- scheduler model
- syscall ABI
- interrupts and exceptions
- process and thread model
- driver framework contract

## Phases
1. Spec complete
2. Reference prototypes
3. Test harness and invariants
4. Host-bridged integration
5. Native kernel module migration

## Exit Criteria
- specs are versioned and reviewed
- prototypes have tests
- migration map from Hyperlayer to native path is explicit
